meta.disclaimer: Fun-money tracking only. Returns shown are stake × odds (includes the stake back). Some scorelines on the same match are mutually exclusive — they can't all land.

matchEventsNote: Per-match player events scraped after full-time by the settlement cron. `status` flips to "finished" once the match is over and goals are filled. `goals` is in chronological scoring order — the first non-own-goal entry is the first scorer. Each goal: team (home|away vs the fixture's listed sides), scorer (full name), minute, assist (full name or null), freeKick/penalty/ownGoal booleans. The specials auto-grade off this; never invent events — only fill from a verified live source.

specialsNote: Real 1xBet single bets across both batches. Most auto-grade off matchEvents (goals/assists/first scorer/free-kicks) + the final score; the Kane first-goal + any-other-score special is settled manually (statusOverride). Set statusOverride only to correct a bad scrape.

grade.note: SETTLED LOST: Portugal 5-0 Uzbekistan FT (ESPN event 760461, 35 keyEvents). ESPN logs zero on-field VAR-monitor review events for this fixture — only drinks-break/stoppage delays. The 'Yes' side needs the referee to actually go to the monitor and keep the decision; with no monitor review on record, that condition never occurred, so Yes loses. VAR on-field-review monitor outcomes are not exposed in ESPN structured data — the one market type ESPN cannot auto-grade.
